name: BLACKSTONE MORTGAGE TRUST, INC.
business: Blackstone Mortgage Trust is a real estate finance company that originates, acquires, and manages senior loans and other debt or credit-oriented investments collateralized by or relating to commercial real estate in North America, Europe, and Australia. The company is externally managed by BXMT Advisors L.L.C., a subsidiary of Blackstone Inc., and qualifies as a REIT. Its portfolio is composed primarily of senior loans secured by high-quality, institutional assets located in major markets.
sellsTo: experienced, well-capitalized real estate investment owners and operators

exposures.sentence: Our investment strategy is to originate, acquire, and manage senior loans and other debt or credit-oriented investments collateralized by or relating to commercial real estate in North America, Europe and Australia.
